extracted_information: CodeMirror is a web-based code editor component with a rich programming interface for extension. It's open-source under the MIT license.

pricing.funding_model: Social expectation to fund maintenance for commercial use, no legal obligation.

features.name: Accessibility
features.description: Works well with screen readers and keyboard-only users.

features.name: Mobile Support
features.description: Uses platform's native selection and editing features on phones.

features.name: Bidirectional Text
features.description: Supports mixing of right-to-left and left-to-right text.

features.name: Syntax Highlighting
features.description: Colors code to reflect syntactic structure.

features.name: Line Numbers
features.description: Displays gutters with line numbers or other information next to the code.

features.name: Autocompletion
features.description: Provides language-specific completion hints in the editor.

features.name: Code Folding
features.description: Temporarily hides parts of the document.

features.name: Search/Replace
features.description: Editor-specific search, regexp search, and replace functionality.

features.name: Full Parsing
features.description: Detailed parse trees allow many types of language integration.

features.name: Extension Interface
features.description: Robustly implement demanding editor extensions.

features.name: Modularity
features.description: Most features are implemented on top of a generic public API.

features.name: Speed
features.description: Remains responsive even on huge documents and long lines.

features.name: Bracket Closing
features.description: Automatically inserts matching brackets during typing.

features.name: Linting
features.description: Shows error and warning messages in the editor.

features.name: Flexible Styling
features.description: Mixes font styles and sizes, adds widgets in the content.

features.name: Theming
features.description: Imports or creates custom visual editor styles.

features.name: Collaborative Editing
features.description: Allows multiple users to edit the same document.

features.name: Undo History
features.description: Undo and redo functionality with collab editing support.

features.name: Multiple Selections
features.description: Selects and edits multiple ranges of the document at once.

features.name: Internationalization
features.description: Provides custom text to display or announce to the user.

extension_system.description: Has a rich programming interface to allow further extension. Features are implemented on top of a generic public API, enabling robust implementation of demanding editor extensions.

performance_characteristics.description: Remains responsive even on huge documents and long lines.
